title: Residual Information in Shared Cloud Object Stores

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

spl:
index=cloud sourcetype=aws:cloudtrail earliest=-7d eventName IN ("PutBucketAcl","PutBucketPolicy","PutObjectAcl")
| spath path=requestParameters output=requestParameters
| search requestParameters="*"public"*" OR requestParameters="*AllUsers*"
| stats count by userName, requestParameters, aws_account_id
value: Monitors public ACL changes on object storage for SC-4 information in shared resources.
implementation: (1) Use `spath` carefully on large events; (2) integrate AWS Config snapshots optional; (3) auto revert tickets; (4) map to CP-9 backup separation.
visualization: Table (public exposure changes), Time chart (trend), Single value (accounts)
cimSpl: | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Change.All_Changes by All_Changes.user | sort - count
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
